error.signature: nginx: [emerg] bind() to 0.0.0.0:80 failed (98: Address already in use)
error.regex: (bind\(\).*failed.*Address already in use|bind.*0\.0\.0\.0.*failed|98.*Address already in use|EADDRINUSE.*nginx)

verdict.summary: Port 80/443 already in use by another process. Another nginx instance, Apache, or a container.

dead_ends.action: Change nginx to a different port like 8080
dead_ends.why_fails: Clients expect 80/443. Changing ports requires all URLs and redirects to be updated.

dead_ends.action: Use kill -9 on the process using the port
dead_ends.why_fails: kill -9 does not allow graceful shutdown; may corrupt logs or leave connections hanging. Use graceful stop.

workarounds.action: Find and stop the conflicting process
workarounds.how: sudo ss -tlnp | grep :80  # or: sudo lsof -i :80

workarounds.action: Use nginx -s stop to stop the existing nginx
Check for and stop Apache if installed alongside nginx
workarounds.how: sudo systemctl stop apache2 && sudo systemctl disable apache2
